name: codex-plugin
description: Inkbox bridge for Codex over email, SMS, iMessage, and voice.

interface.shortDescription: Talk to Codex from email, SMS, iMessage, and calls.
interface.longDescription: Give a Codex coding agent an Inkbox identity with a mailbox, phone number, iMessage, and voice-call bridge.
defaultPrompt: Text Codex to inspect this repo and report status.
Ask Codex to make a small code change from iMessage.
Have Codex summarize recent project work by SMS.
